backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all core data types (Product, Order, UserProfile, BlogPost, etc.) and backend logic for a pharmacy platform, including medicine categories, order management, and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the Footer component's contact phone number was updated to +91-8429145707 with the corresponding tel: href link.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to short summaries describing each component or page's purpose and notable recent changes.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the MEDANTA CARE React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TSX entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app file that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes, wraps them in a layout with Navbar, Footer, floating widgets, and a profile setup modal for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Simple full-page access denied screen shown when a non-admin user attempts to access the admin dashboard, with a link back to the home page.
frontend/src/components/AddressFormModal: Modal dialog for adding or editing a user address, with form validation and mutation hooks for both create and update operations.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogFormMo: A modal form for creating or editing blog posts, supporting image upload with progress tracking and optional publish-on-save functionality.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogManage: Admin section that lists all blog posts in a table with actions to create, edit, delete, publish, or unpublish each post.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrderManag: Admin section that displays all orders in an expandable list, allowing admins to view order details and update order status via a dropdown.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductFor: A modal dialog form for creating or editing a product, with fields for name, description, price, category, prescription requirement, stock status, and image URL, using create/update mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductMan: Admin section that displays a searchable, tabular list of all products with options to add, edit, or delete each product using the ProductFormModal and product query hooks.
frontend/src/components/BlogCard.tsx: Card component for displaying a blog post preview with cover image, category badge, title, excerpt, author, and date.
frontend/src/components/CategoryGrid.tsx: Renders a responsive grid of medicine category cards, each linking to the catalog page filtered by that category, using display metadata from categoryUtils.
frontend/src/components/ChatbotWidget.ts: A floating chat widget that displays a support assistant with predefined FAQ buttons, rendering a message thread between the user and bot.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site-wide footer with brand info, social media links, quick navigation links, legal policy links, and contact details for MEDANTA CARE.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Hero banner section for the homepage featuring a headline, CTA buttons for ordering and prescription upload, trust badges, and a hero image with floating stats.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with logo, desktop search form, nav links, cart icon with item count, and user authentication menu with admin and dashboard links.
frontend/src/components/OrderProgressTra: Displays a visual order status tracker with horizontal (desktop) and vertical (mobile) layouts, highlighting completed, current, and pending stages of an order.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Renders a product card with image, category, name, price, stock status, and an add-to-cart button, linking to the product detail page.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that collects and saves a new user's name, email, and phone number before allowing them to proceed, with validation for required fields.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialSlide: An auto-advancing testimonial carousel displaying customer reviews with star ratings, author info, and manual prev/next navigation controls.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: A fixed floating WhatsApp button that opens a pre-filled WhatsApp chat link for customer support.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Custom hook that wraps Internet Identity login/logout logic, exposing authentication state, principal ID, and a logout function that also clears the React Query cache.
frontend/src/hooks/useCart.ts: Custom hook managing a global shopping cart with localStorage persistence, exposing add, remove, update quantity, clear, and total/count helpers via a module-level event system.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient-based login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for the backend actor, covering CRUD operations for products, orders, user profiles, blog posts, and related entities with cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS, and defines MEDANTA CARE brand color tokens (OKLCH) for light/dark modes along with custom utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/categoryUtils.ts: Utility module that maps MedicineCategory enum values to display metadata (label, icon, color) and exports helper functions for formatting prices, dates, order statuses, and category info.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tab-based navigation for managing orders, products, and blog posts; guards access by checking authentication and admin role.
frontend/src/pages/BlogListingPage.tsx: Blog listing page that displays published posts in a grid with category filter buttons and skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPostPage.tsx: Individual blog post page that fetches and renders a post by ID with cover image, metadata, content, and social share links.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page that lists cart items with quantity controls and removal options, shows the order total, and links to checkout.
frontend/src/pages/CatalogPage.tsx: Displays a medicine catalog page with search, category filtering via a sidebar, and a product grid. Fetches products using React Query hooks and supports URL-based search/category params.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Multi-step checkout flow (address, prescription, payment, confirmation) for authenticated users. Handles address selection/creation, prescription file upload, payment method choice, and order placement.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerDashboard.tsx: Customer dashboard with tabs for order history, saved addresses, and prescriptions. Displays order progress, allows address management, and requires authentication.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page composed of multiple sections including a hero, 'Why Choose Us' features, category grid, price comparison, and testimonials. Primarily assembles existing components with static marketing content.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that triggers Internet Identity authentication via the useAuth hook. Shows benefit highlights and redirects already-authenticated users to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/OrderTrackingPage.tsx: Order tracking page that fetches a specific order by ID and displays its status, progress tracker, and item details. Requires authentication and handles loading/not-found states.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: React page component that displays full product details (image, price, stock, prescription badge) fetched by ID, with quantity selector and add-to-cart functionality including a brief confirmation state.
frontend/src/pages/StaticPage.tsx: Generic static content page component that renders titled sections (About Us, Contact Us, Terms, Privacy Policy, Refund Policy) from a hardcoded CONTENT map using a shared layout with a back-navigation link.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helper functions to read, persist, and clear URL query parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining MEDANTA CARE brand colors (navy, orange, purple), custom fonts (Inter/Poppins), extended border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 5) describing the MEDANTA CARE e-pharmacy platform's architecture, brand identity, existing features, and known issues for build planning and continuity tracking.
